parsed.production_notes: The video combines a human actor recorded on a smartphone with a 3D-animated AI avatar. The avatar exhibits perfectly smooth, slightly unnatural movements and lip-sync typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: 3D animated young female. Fair complexion, large green eyes, and wavy red hair. Features are stylized and smooth.
characters.wardrobe: Plain white short-sleeved t-shirt. Small gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult human male. Medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, and a short, neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: Dark green short-sleeved t-shirt. White wireless earbud in the right ear. Black smartwatch on the left wrist.

scenes.setting: Top: blurred vanity mirror. Bottom: plain room.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is a 3D animated woman with fair skin, green eyes, and wavy red hair. She wears a white t-shirt and crescent moon earrings. Her chin rests on her right hand in a relaxed pose. The background is blurred, showing round lights like a vanity mirror. The lighting is soft and evenly distributed across her face.

Character B is a human male with dark hair and a short beard. He wears a dark green t-shirt and a white wireless earbud. A black smartwatch is visible on his left wrist. He looks directly forward with a neutral expression. The background is a plain light grey wall with a light switch.

scenes.visual_description: The video features a split-horizontal layout with an animated character on top and a human actor on the bottom. A graphic of Spanish flags is overlaid at the top edge. Text captions appear centrally, spanning the dividing line between the two panels. Icons like checkmarks and crosses occasionally pop up alongside the text. The setup mimics a digital video call interface.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]

Character B says: Sí, yo conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]

Character A says: Técnicamente es correcto, pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]

Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]

Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]

Character B says: Soy veinticuatro. [I am twenty-four.]

Character A says: Quieres decir, tengo veinticuatro años. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]

Character B says: Tengo veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years old.]

Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]

Character B says: Mi nombre es Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]

Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, my name is Gustavo.]

Character B says: Me llamo Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]

Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]

Character B says: Gracias, ¿pero quién eres? [Thanks, but who are you?]

Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]

Character B says: Pero mi español es muy básico. No puedo hablar. [But my Spanish is very basic. I can't speak.]

Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your native language while you learn Spanish.]

Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]

Character A says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I am an AI.]

Character B says: Voy a descargar esta aplicación. [I am going to download this app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: The frame consists entirely of a solid white background. There are no characters or objects visible in the scene. The lighting is completely flat and uniform. No environmental details or textures are present. The composition serves as a blank slate.

scenes.visual_description: The video concludes with a static promotional end card. A solid white background fills the entire screen. A purple app icon and brand name are centered in the frame. Two black app store badges are positioned near the bottom. The layout is clean and focused on brand elements.
scenes.on_screen_text:
praktika.ai
GET IT ON Google Play
